name: Patagonia
philosophy: A heritage outdoor brand whose digital surface reads like a paper field journal that learned to do e-commerce — sand-cream canvas, alpine red accents, serif display, refusal of digital-marketing tropes.

design_language.motion_signature: Almost none — 150ms ease-out fades on hover/image-load. Animation that draws attention is anti-brand.

trademark_signals: Serif display headlines in a sea of athletic-brand geometric sans
Photo credits visible on every editorial image — photographer + location, always
Worn Wear repair stories given the same hero treatment as new products
Activism content sits on the same nav level as e-commerce
Square buttons with zero radius — anti-tech geometry
ai_slop_avoided: Don't use airbrushed/perfect outdoor photography — grain is the aesthetic
Don't add urgency banners or countdown timers
